description: Style Note Get ready to look your best, provogue brings fashion to the world in the most subtly brilliant way with this stylish brown leather belt. Wear it with a casual pair of light brown or beige trousers to truly bring out the potential of the belt. Let the world know that you are a class apart with this stunner. Product Details Brown leather belt for men Has a tang claso with holes to customise the Fit Material and Care Leather Use polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Style NoteGet ready to look your best, Provogue brings fashion to the world in the most subtly brilliant way with this stylish brown leather belt.
